description: Create a self-monitoring channel named 'Ops_Dashboard_Generator' that generates a live HTML status report of all channels. The channel must poll the NextGen Connect REST API (https://localhost:8443/api/channels/statistics) every 30 seconds using the credentials admin/admin and required headers ('X-Requested-With: OpenAPI', 'Accept: application/json'). Transform the JSON statistics into an HTML table containing columns for 'Channel Name', 'Received', 'Queued', and 'Error' counts, ensuring data for the running simulation channels 'Sim_ADT_Inbound' and 'Sim_Lab_Results' is included. Write the final HTML output to /var/www/html/dashboard.html.
